<!doctype html><html lang="zh-Hant"><head><meta charset="utf-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1"><title>Power BI Executive Dashboard Checklist｜LIN YOUNG</title><meta name="description" content="A checklist for building executive-ready Power BI dashboards."><link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/styles.css"></head><body><article class="article"><nav><a href="../index.html">← Back to home</a></nav><p class="eyebrow">Power BI</p><h1>Power BI executive dashboard checklist</h1><ul><li>Does the first page answer the most important executive question?</li><li>Are the key metrics visible without scrolling?</li><li>Is the variance explained by drivers, not only numbers?</li><li>Can users identify risk and action within 30 seconds?</li><li>Are filters simple enough for non-technical leaders?</li></ul><p>Executive dashboards should prioritize clarity, speed, and decision usefulness over visual complexity.</p></article></body></html>
